---
title: "Measure-Theoretic Probability I"
subtitle: "CORE-003 | Core Mathematics — Year 1"
description: "Rigorous probability theory built on measure theory. This is the mathematical foundation for all statistical inference, stochastic modeling, and uncertainty quantification in the curriculum."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Measure-Theoretic Probability I

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
